selectedOwner: freshness candidate source and owner exclusions plus current-owner policy
decision: Reject candidate self-source and candidate-root ownership. Candidate evidence stays outside default current context and cannot feed a later scan.
evidenceRequired: Self-source and candidate-owner semantic checks pass.
limitations: A future scanner must still prove that its input selection implements these exclusions.
nonClaims: Retained evidence is not current policy merely because it is machine-readable.
rollbackRevocation: Remove candidate paths from current-owner routing and quarantine any self-fed candidate chain.
